No Poverty.reason: The study of '戶部則例' (Ministry of Revenue regulations) indirectly relates to economic resources and social protection, aligning with Target 1.4.

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to food security or hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate-level course, it directly contributes to tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops advanced legal analysis and academic writing skills (Target 4.4, 4.7).
evidence: 練習如何書寫碩博士論文或期刊論文

Gender Equality.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to gender equality or women's empowerment.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to energy access or clean energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Analysis of historical '戶部則例' concerning customs and tax regulations provides indirect insight into economic policy, relevant to Targets 8.1-8.3.
evidence: 關稅及稅則法規範架構

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: Studying '工部則例' (Ministry of Works regulations) provides historical context on infrastructure development, aligning with Target 9.1.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Analyzing '理籓則例' (Court of Colonial Affairs regulations) and developing appropriate laws for society indirectly addresses discriminatory laws and inequalities (Target 10.3).
evidence: 發展能力建構自己社會適當的法律

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The study of '法制史專題研究' (legal history) and 'traditional Chinese法制' contributes to protecting cultural heritage (Target 11.4).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Analysis of '鹽法之法規範分析' (salt law regulations) offers historical insight into resource management, indirectly linking to Target 12.2.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to climate change or environmental action.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to marine ecosystems or aquatic resources.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly or indirectly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's core focus on legal history, analyzing historical legal systems and institutions, directly supports promoting the rule of law and effective institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).
evidence: 中國法規範體系的全貌

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The emphasis on a 'comparative law perspective' and developing 'international vision' directly aligns with enhancing knowledge sharing and policy coherence (Targets 17.6, 17.14).
evidence: 科際整合與國際視野的能力
